$schema_comment: Each case is one PDF page graded against a hand-typed ground-truth markdown file. See README.md for how to add a case.

cases.description: AG 9.1 Formelzettel page 8 — δ_S decomposition. Regression case from 2026-05-21 (DPI 150 produced G·d/E_S substitution; DPI 200 fixed it 2026-05-22).
AG 9.1 exercise page 1 — Übungsaufgabe 9.1. Tests prose intro + diagram captions + a 13-row 'Gegeben' parametric list. Common exercise-page shape.
